member.summary: Gets or sets the payment status.

member.summary: Gets or sets the campaign id.

member.summary: Gets or sets when the campaign ends.

member.summary: Gets or sets when the campaign ends for reporting purposed.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.Campaign.IsDefaultCampaign
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether gets or sets where this is the default campaign when there is no campaign.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.Campaign.ProductCatalogues
member.summary: Gets or sets the associated product catalogues that belong to this campaign.

member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.Configuration
member.summary: Define custom configuration for the Tenant.
member.remarks: This class hold specific configuration for the Tenant that was stored in the appSettings.json file. Now this configuration is Tenant depends and it doesn't make sense to have it in a single file.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.Configuration.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the Configuration Id.

member.summary: Gets or sets when the configuration was created.

member.summary: Gets or sets the configuration name.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.Configuration.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the configuration value.

member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.Donation
member.summary: Represent a donation from a user.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.Donation.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique id.

member.summary: Gets or sets the public id for the donation. Used in the payment system.

member.summary: Gets or sets the associated with the donation.

member.summary: Gets or sets the donation datetime.

member.summary: Gets or sets the service amount for the donation.

member.summary: Gets or sets the that the user make a donation.

member.summary: Gets or sets the payment status.

member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of this belong to this donation.

member.summary: Gets or sets the MultiBank Entity value.

member.summary: Gets or sets the confirmedpayment for this donation.

member.summary: Gets or sets the active when the donation was created.

member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.Invoice
member.summary: Represent an invoice.

member.summary: Gets a reference to an invalid invoice.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.Invoice.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique id.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.Invoice.Sequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the invoice sequence for the current year.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.Invoice.Number
member.summary: Gets or sets the invoice number.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.Invoice.Created
member.summary: Gets or sets when the invoice is created.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.Invoice.Year
member.summary: Gets or sets the year of the invoice. (Used for the combined Index).

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.Invoice.User
member.summary: Gets or sets the user related to the invoice.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.Invoice.Donation
member.summary: Gets or sets the donation related to the invoice.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.Invoice.BlobName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the invoice in the Azure Storage Account.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.Invoice.InternalMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets an internal message used in case that something happen to the invoice.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.Invoice.IsCanceled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the invoice is canceled or not.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.Invoice.FoodBank
member.summary: Gets or sets the Food Bank for the invoice.

member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.InvoiceStatusResult
member.summary: Invoice status result when calling generate invoice.

member.name: F:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.InvoiceStatusResult.None
member.summary: None.

member.name: F:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.InvoiceStatusResult.NotPayed
member.summary: The donation is not payed.

member.name: F:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.InvoiceStatusResult.DonationNotFound
member.summary: Donation id not found.

member.name: F:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.InvoiceStatusResult.DonationUserNotFound
member.summary: The user belongs to the donation is not found.

member.name: F:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.InvoiceStatusResult.ConfirmedPaymentIsNull
member.summary: Confirmed payment is null.

member.name: F:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.InvoiceStatusResult.DonationIsOneYearOld
member.summary: The donation is one year old.

member.name: F:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.InvoiceStatusResult.NifNotValid
member.summary: Nif is not valid.

member.name: F:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.InvoiceStatusResult.ConfirmedFailedPaymentStatus
member.summary: Donation has a confirmed failed payment status.

member.name: F:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.InvoiceStatusResult.GeneratedOk
member.summary: Invoice generated ok.

member.name: F:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.InvoiceStatusResult.InvoiceCanceled
member.summary: The invoice was cancelled.

member.summary: Payment status enum.

member.name: F:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.PaymentStatus.Payed
member.summary: The donation is payed.

member.name: F:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.PaymentStatus.NotPayed
member.summary: The donation is not yet payed.

member.name: F:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.PaymentStatus.WaitingPayment
member.summary: Waiting for the donation to be payed.

member.name: F:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.PaymentStatus.ErrorPayment
member.summary: Waiting for the donation to be payed.

member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.PaymentStatusMessages
member.summary: Represent all the string that the payment system use in the status column.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.PaymentStatusMessages.SuccessPaymentMessages
member.summary: Gets the success payment messages.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Model.PaymentStatusMessages.FailedPaymentMessages
member.summary: Gets the failed payment messages.

member.summary: Define the payment type.

member.summary: No payment.
